subject: I want to give you a [huge] gift on the 19th (catch inside)
body:
Mozination -

It's true.

On the 19th of August, I want to give you a huge gift that I've secretly been working on for over 4 years.

It predates 100M Offers (my last book) and I have never spoken about it publicly before.

The catch? You have to turn up live to get it. ;)

Find out in a few weeks.

Enjoy.

Alex.

PS - Here's a sneak peek of some of the ads we're about to launch to announce it.

BONUS: Ads Sneak Peek

As promised, I wanted to give you guys some behind-the-scenes goodies & an inside look at what's to come.

Thank you for being part of the email community.

More on the way.
